summary: Frontend offline functionality testing for 'Proyectos de Actualización' module completed successfully. All 4 test cases passed. The offline mode works correctly - projects are saved to IndexedDB when visiting the page online, the offline indicator shows correct count, the 'Sin conexión' banner appears when offline, and data loads from cache when navigating offline.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ IndexedDB store 'proyectos_offline' is created correctly in version 3 of 'asomunicipios_offline' database
✓ saveProyectosOffline() function saves projects when visiting page online (filtroEstado === 'todos')
✓ getProyectosOffline() function retrieves projects from cache when offline
✓ Offline banner 'Sin conexión - Mostrando N proyecto(s) guardado(s) localmente' displays correctly
✓ Header indicator 'Offline (N)' shows correct count of offline items
✓ useOffline hook correctly listens for 'offlineDataUpdated' events to refresh stats
✓ OfflineReadyBadge component correctly calculates total offline items (predios + proyectos)
Note: Multiple 'useOffline] Datos offline actualizados' console logs indicate event is firing multiple times - minor optimization opportunity
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offline functionality for 'Proyectos de Actualización' is fully working. IndexedDB database 'asomunicipios_offline' version 3 contains 'proyectos_offline' store. Test project: 'Proyecto_prueba_ZU_Sardinata' (Sardinata). Route: /dashboard/proyectos-actualizacion. Offline simulation can be done with page.context().set_offline(True) in Playwright.

test_projects_saved_to_indexeddb_online.details: When visiting /dashboard/proyectos-actualizacion online, projects are saved to IndexedDB 'proyectos_offline' store. Console shows '[Online] Proyectos guardados para uso offline' and '[OfflineDB] 1 proyectos guardados offline'

test_offline_indicator_shows_correct_cou.details: Header shows 'Offline (1)' badge with green checkmark indicating 1 project available offline

test_offline_banner_displayed.details: When offline, page shows amber banner 'Sin conexión - Mostrando 1 proyecto(s) guardado(s) localmente' and top banner 'Sin conexión - Solo datos previamente descargados están disponibles'

test_data_loads_from_cache_offline.details: When navigating to Proyectos page while offline, data loads from IndexedDB cache. Console shows '[Offline] Cargados 1 proyectos desde cache'. Project card 'Proyecto_prueba_ZU_Sardinata' is displayed correctly
